hypothesis: Compute the pure top-eight habitat ranking once per market tile and reuse it across paired and independent wildlife drafts while preserving every later habitat replay.
mechanism: Temporary tile place/undo operations restore explicit merge records but intentionally retain some union-find path-compression history. Habitat scores are mathematically invariant, but moving a frontier scan before those mutation boundaries changes later tie ordering and therefore the neural request trace.

verdict.reason: The optimization failed the Phase 0 bit-exact diagnostic gate even though final scores matched. Logical and physical neural row counts changed, proving a different action-evaluation trace.
